# Weather.com

> Weather.com provides comprehensive weather forecasts, maps, news, and storm tracking for locations worldwide. The Weather Channel offers accurate forecasting, severe weather alerts, hurricane tracking, and weather-related news content to help users stay informed and prepared.

Weather.com is the digital platform of The Weather Channel, providing essential weather information through forecasts, interactive maps, real-time alerts, and comprehensive storm coverage. The site serves millions of users seeking current conditions, extended forecasts, severe weather warnings, and climate-related news.

All location-specific forecasts use the pattern `/weather/[forecast-type]/l/[location-code]` where location-code is Weather.com's unique identifier for cities and regions.

## Core Weather Services

- [Today's Weather](/weather/today/l/[location-code]): Current conditions including temperature, humidity, wind, and visibility for specific locations
- [Hourly Forecast](/weather/hourbyhour/l/[location-code]): Hour-by-hour weather predictions for the next 48 hours by location
- [10-Day Forecast](/weather/tenday/l/[location-code]): Extended forecast with daily high/low temperatures, precipitation chances, and conditions
- [Weekend Forecast](/weather/weekend/l/[location-code]): Detailed weekend weather planning with Saturday and Sunday forecasts
- [Monthly Outlook](/weather/monthly/l/[location-code]): Long-range monthly weather trends and temperature/precipitation patterns

## Maps & Radar

- [Interactive Radar](/maps/radar): Real-time precipitation and storm tracking with customizable layers
- [Satellite Maps](/maps/satellite): Current satellite imagery showing cloud cover and weather patterns  
- [Current US Weather Map](/maps/currentusweather): National overview of current conditions and fronts
- [10-Day US Forecast Map](/maps/tendayforecast): Extended forecast visualization across the United States
- [Severe Alerts Map](/maps/severealerts): Current tornado watches, severe thunderstorm warnings, and weather advisories
- [Temperature Maps](/maps/temperature): Current and forecast temperature distribution
- [Precipitation Maps](/maps/precipitation): Rainfall and snowfall forecasts
- [Wind Maps](/maps/wind): Wind speed and direction visualization

## Storm Centers

- [Hurricane Central](/storms/hurricane-central): Comprehensive hurricane tracking, forecasts, and historical data
- [Hurricane News](/storms/hurricane): Breaking hurricane news, updates, and preparedness information
- [Tornado Central](/storms/tornado-central): Tornado reports, watches, warnings, and safety information
- [Tornado News](/storms/tornado): Current tornado activity, damage reports, and safety guidance
- [Winter Storm Central](/storms/winter): Snow forecasts, ice storm tracking, and winter weather advisories

## Health & Weather

- [Health Central](/health): How weather affects health conditions and wellness
- [Allergy Tracker](/maps/health/allergies): Pollen forecasts and allergy information
- [Tree Pollen Map](/maps/health/allergies/treepollen): Current tree pollen levels and forecasts
- [Grass Pollen Map](/maps/health/allergies/grasspollen): Grass pollen tracking and alerts
- [Ragweed Pollen Map](/maps/health/allergies/ragweedpollen): Ragweed pollen forecasts and levels
- [Air Quality Index](/maps/health/air-quality): Current air quality conditions and forecasts
- [UV Index](/maps/health/uv): Solar UV radiation levels and sun safety information
- [Cold & Flu Tracker](/maps/health/cold-flu): Weather-related illness tracking and prevention
- [Skin Health](/health/skin): Weather impacts on skin conditions and care recommendations

## Lifestyle

- [Atmosphere Reviews](/lifestyle/atmosphere): Weather-related product reviews and recommendations
- [Recipes](/lifestyle/recipes): Weather-appropriate cooking and seasonal recipes
- [Home & Garden](/lifestyle/home-garden): Weather guidance for gardening, landscaping, and home maintenance
- [Travel & Outdoors](/lifestyle/travel-outdoors): Weather planning for outdoor activities and travel
- [Pets & Animals](/lifestyle/pets-animals): Weather safety and care tips for pets and animals

## Sports & Recreation

- [Boat & Beach](/sports-recreation/boat-beach): Marine weather, beach conditions, and water safety
- [Fishing](/sports-recreation/fishing): Fishing weather conditions and outdoor recreation
- [Golf Weather](/sports-recreation/golf): Golf course conditions and tee-time weather
- [Ski Conditions](/sports-recreation/ski): Snow reports, lift conditions, and mountain weather
- [Running Weather](/sports-recreation/running): Optimal conditions for outdoor exercise
- [Outdoor Activities](/activities): Weather guidance for recreational activities

## News & Features

- [Weather News](/news): Breaking weather stories, climate reports, and meteorological developments
- [Feature Stories](/features): In-depth weather-related articles, investigations, and human interest stories
- [Climate & Environment](/news/climate): Climate change coverage, environmental impact stories, and sustainability content
- [Weather Photos](/photos): User-submitted and professional weather photography

## Travel & Planning

- [Travel Weather](/travel): Airport delays, road conditions, and destination weather
- [Flight Delay Information](/travel/flights): Real-time airport weather impacts
- [Road Weather](/travel/roads): Highway conditions and travel advisories
- [Destination Guides](/travel/destinations): Weather information for popular travel locations
- [Event Planning](/activities/events): Weather considerations for outdoor events

## Video Content

- [General Weather Videos](/video/[category]/[title-slug]): Weather forecasts and educational content
- [Storm Videos](/storms/[storm-type]/video/[title-slug]): Hurricane, tornado, and severe weather coverage
- [Breaking News Videos](/news/weather/video/[title-slug]): Real-time weather event coverage
- [Health Videos](/health/[condition]/video/[title-slug]): Weather and health-related content
- [Safety Videos](/safety/[topic]/video/[title-slug]): Weather preparedness and emergency guidance

## Detailed Documentation

- [Core Weather Services](https://weather.com/docs/llm/core-weather-services.md): Comprehensive guide to forecasting services, current conditions, and technical specifications
- [Storm Centers](https://weather.com/docs/llm/storm-centers.md): Detailed coverage of hurricane tracking, tornado monitoring, and severe weather systems
- [Maps & Radar](https://weather.com/docs/llm/maps-radar.md): Interactive mapping platform, radar capabilities, and weather visualization tools
- [News & Features](https://weather.com/docs/llm/news-features.md): Editorial content strategy, video production, and journalism standards
- [Content Patterns](https://weather.com/docs/llm/content-patterns.md): Complete URL structure guide and content organization principles

## Optional

- [Create Account](/signup): Sign up for a Weather.com account to access personalized features
- [Sign In](/signin): Log in to your Weather.com account
- [Go Premium](/subscribe?tpcc=mktg-commerceIndex-mainmenu-subscribe): Subscribe to premium weather services and ad-free experience
- [About Us](/about): Information about The Weather Channel and weather.com
- [Terms of Use](/legal): Legal terms and conditions for using the service
- [Privacy Settings](/privacy-settings): Data usage and privacy protection controls
- [Contact](/contact): Customer service and feedback information
- [Widgets](/widgets): Embeddable weather widgets for websites
- [Weather TV](/tv): The Weather Channel television programming information
- [Weather Safety](/safety): Severe weather safety tips and emergency preparedness
- [My Dashboard](/mydashboard): Personalized weather dashboard for registered users
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): Data usage and privacy protection policies
